    CAMP LAKE STEPHENS

    A place where people encounter God and respond to His call to transform the world.

    SUMMER CAMPS

    Since 1946, Camp Lake Stephens in Oxford, MS, has been a place where faith deepens, friendships grow, and adventure fills each day. Our dedicated staff create space for campers to thrive, laugh, and discover who they are while enjoying nature and our facilities at CLS.

    Learn More

    OUR RETREATS

    Throughout the year, we host various retreats designed to slow the pace, renew the spirit, and build meaningful community.

    Learn More

    HOST A RETREAT

    When we’re not running our own programs, we love welcoming schools, churches, and other organizations to use our spaces for rest, renewal, and connection.

    Learn More
